item.title: How to set up printer in NUS Cinnamon College on Linux
item.author: Author
item.description: This is a step-by-step guide in setting up printing service in Cinnamon College, NUS. This guide might be useful for MacOS users as well whose OS uses CUPS for the underlying printing service, but I have not tried on a Mac before. Note As of May 2021, the printers in Cinnamon College uses Samba to provide printing service. If you are familiar with CUPS and SAMBA, you can skip most of this post with these pointers:
